scenarios.title: Medical Imaging and Segmentation Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Medical image transforms, nnU-Net planning/training/inference, MONAI bundles, TorchIO patch workflows, healthcare segmentation, and 3D image augmentation.
scenarios.role: 0 for medical image loading, preprocessing, augmentation, patch-based training/inference, CLI conversion, and I/O troubleshooting.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `torchio` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: cli and io, data model, patch workflows, and transforms.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `torchio` when the request names `torchio`, centers on medical image loading, preprocessing, augmentation, patch-based training/inference, CLI conversion, and I/O troubleshooting, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in medical imaging and segmentation workflows. Then route to CLI and I/O, data model, patch workflows, or transforms when those focused workflows match.
